summary: Team Detail page (TeamDetail.jsx) fully tested. All 8 backend API tests pass. Frontend: Navigation, header, members, project allocations, monthly load all working. Expand/collapse toggle bug found and fixed. Support team shows RED badge at 100%. RBAC: viewer (READ_ONLY) can access team detail read-only; Modifier/Supprimer buttons hidden for viewer.

issues: Breadcrumb shows '← Équipes > Dev A' correctly ✅

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Toggle expand/collapse bug in TeamDetail.jsx - toggleProject used !s[pid] where s[pid] was undefined on first click, resulting in !undefined=true (stays open). Fixed to !(s[pid] !== false) so first click correctly collapses.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Team Detail page /teams/{id} fully validated. Dev A team (9ff21917-3f4d-4714-aa3d-051690cb7adf): 3 members, 5 projects, 6-month chart. All data-testids present. Toggle collapse/expand fixed. Support team badge shows RED at 100%. Viewer (viewer@altair.fr / View1234!) can access team detail read-only. Router ordering correct (capacity-heatmap, capacity-alerts before {team_id}).
